paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions. There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. regarding its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026. This news was reported by TradingView on July 21, 2026. Additionally, there have been social media posts mentioning other companies, such as Google and OpenAI, but these are not directly related to Fermi Inc.

There have been several recent SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A filing on July 21, 2026, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has also been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
